results.text: Lost An Eye: Disadvantage on ranged attacks.
Frostbitten Fingers: Struggle with fine motor tasks.
Venom-Scarred: Disadvantage on Tests for poison or fever.
Lame Leg: Disadvantage on Tests against being knocked prone.
Head Injury: Frequent headaches and impaired focus.
Frozen Lung: Shortness of breath with physical effort.
Deafened In One Ear: Difficulty pinpointing sounds.
Necrotic Burns: Half any HP recovered from resting.
Cracked Spine: Stiff movements. Next time you are broken, you DIE.
